main.description: An are.na block mirrored onto the owner's PDS. The record key is the are.na block id. A block connected into several channels has exactly one block record; each placement is an is.dame.arena.mirror.connection record. Reference URLs and metadata are always stored, so a record renders the same whether or not media was also captured as a blob.

text.description: Text blocks only: the content, markdown.

source.description: Where the block came from (Link/Embed/Image sources).

image.description: The block's imagery: the artifact itself for image blocks, a preview for link/embed/attachment blocks. `blob` is present when the file was captured onto the PDS (blobs media mode); `src` always references are.na's copy. aspect ratio is width/height — atproto records cannot hold floats.

blob.description: PDS-hosted copy of the original file, when captured.

updatedAt.description: are.na's image updated_at; used to decide when a captured blob is stale.

attachment.description: Attachment blocks only: the attached file.

embed.description: Embed blocks only: oEmbed-ish render info.

html.description: Embed HTML as provided by are.na.

creator.description: Who created the block on are.na — not necessarily the repo owner when mirroring connected blocks. Absent when the creator's account is gone.

createdAt.description: When the block was created on are.na.
